title: UNIQUE constraint does not set tkey property on the corresponding BAT
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE, age INT CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO users (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
INSERT INTO users (id, name, age) VALUES (2, 'Bob', NULL);
INSERT INTO users (id, name, age) VALUES (3, 'Alice', 25);
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM users WHERE age IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: UNIQUE constraint fails to set tkey property
